message:
Command `
# Verify the key ODB checkpoint that will feed into DRT
ODB="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper_fixed.odb"
echo "=== Input ODB for DRT ==="
ls -lh "$ODB"

echo ""
echo "=== PDK environment ==="
echo "PDK_ROOT=${PDK_ROOT}"
echo "PDK=${PDK}"
ls /nc/pdk/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No /nc/pdk found"
ls /home/user/.ciel/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "No ~/.ciel found"

echo ""
echo "=== error.log from wrapper_run ==="
cat "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/error.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -20
` executed with exit code 0.
